subtitle: How to buy train and metro tickets in Portugal and Spain. Prices vary by service type, route, and how far in advance you book.
disclaimer: Fares change. Always confirm current prices on the operator website or at the station before you travel.

countries.howToBuy: Long-distance CP trains can be bought online, in the CP app, at station ticket offices, or onboard some Regional services (cash only, no seat guarantee).
serviceBullets: Alfa Pendular — fastest Lisbon–Porto service; book ahead for the best price.
Regional — local and branch-line services; often no reservation.
Urban — suburban networks around Lisbon and Porto.

links.title: CP website
links.body: Buy Alfa Pendular, Intercidades, and Regional tickets online.

links.title: CP app (iOS)
links.body: Official Comboios de Portugal app for mobile tickets.

links.title: CP app (Android)
links.body: Official Comboios de Portugal app for mobile tickets.

links.title: Andante (Porto metro)
links.body: Rechargeable card for Metro do Porto and some buses.

links.title: Metro Porto tariffs
links.body: Current zone pricing for Metro do Porto.

links.title: Navegante (Lisbon)
links.body: Monthly pass covering Metro, buses, ferries, and suburban trains in Lisbon.

links.title: Metro Lisboa tariffs
links.body: Single tickets and passes for Metro de Lisboa.

countries.howToBuy: Most long-distance tickets are sold by Renfe online, in the Renfe app, or at station counters. Commuter networks (Cercanías, Rodalies) and city metros use their own tickets — a Renfe ticket does not automatically include metro rides.
serviceBullets: AVE — high-speed trains on major corridors (e.g. Madrid–Barcelona, Madrid–Seville, Madrid–Galicia).
Alvia / Intercity — long-distance trains beyond the AVE network.
Media Distancia — regional services on secondary lines.
Cercanías / Rodalies — suburban trains around Madrid, Barcelona, and other cities.

links.title: Renfe website
links.body: Search routes and buy AVE, long-distance, and Media Distancia tickets.

links.title: Renfe app (iOS)
links.body: Official Renfe app for tickets and live train info.

links.title: Renfe app (Android)
links.body: Official Renfe app for tickets and live train info.

links.title: Cercanías (commuter trains)
links.body: Suburban networks around Madrid and other cities — often separate from AVE fares.

links.title: Rodalies (Catalonia)
links.body: Commuter trains around Barcelona and Girona, including airport links.

links.title: Metro Madrid
links.body: Tickets and passes for the Madrid metro (separate from Renfe long-distance).

links.title: TMB (Barcelona metro)
links.body: Metro, bus, and tram tickets in the Barcelona area.
